//: Used by api-extractor only. It analyzes the already-emitted .d.ts files under dist/. The `paths` mapping redirects self-imports of `sqlfu` (generated query files inside dist/ say `import type {Client} from 'sqlfu'`) to the dist build output instead of the package.json `exports` target, which would pull src/**/*.ts back into the program and break api-extractor's `.d.ts`-only requirement.
